ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "spid" REAL /* Species ID */,
  "adult_mass" REAL /* Adult mass of the species */,
  "allee_threshold" REAL /* Allee threshold of the species */,
  "disp_alpha" REAL /* Dispersal alpha of the species */,
  "disp_tail_thinness" REAL /* Dispersal tail thinness of the species */,
  "annual_growth_rate" INTEGER /* Annual growth rate of the species */,
  "species_type" INTEGER /* Type of the species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "taxonomic_class" TEXT /* Taxonomic class of the species */,
  "taxonomic_order" TEXT /* Taxonomic order of the species */,
  "taxonomic_family" TEXT /* Taxonomic family of the species */,
  "taxonomic_genus" TEXT /* Taxonomic genus of the species */,
  "taxonomic_species" TEXT /* Taxonomic species of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_species_type FOREIGN KEY ("species_type") REFERENCES species_types ("species_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elevation" (
  "elevation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elevation record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the elevation record belongs to */,
  "elevation_optimum" INTEGER /* Elevation optimum of the species */,
  "elevation_tolerance" INTEGER /* Elevation tolerance of the species */,
  "elevation_units" TEXT /* Units of elevation (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  "elevation_source" TEXT /* Source of elevation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elevation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elevation_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "island_side" (
  "island_side_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each island side record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the island side record belongs to */,
  "island_side_optimum" INTEGER /* Island side optimum of the species */,
  "island_side_tolerance" INTEGER /* Island side tolerance of the species */,
  "island_side_units" TEXT /* Units of island side (e.g., kilometers, miles) */,
  "island_side_source" TEXT /* Source of island side data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("island_side_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_island_side_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_suitability" (
  "habitat_suitability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat suitability record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the habitat suitability record belongs to */,
  "max_habitat_suitability" REAL /* Maximum habitat suitability of the species */,
  "habitat_suitability_score" REAL /* Habitat suitability score (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "habitat_suitability_source" TEXT /* Source of habitat suitability data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_suitability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_habitat_suitability_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_types" (
  "species_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species type */,
  "species_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the species type */,
  "species_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the species type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., species, elevation, habitat suitability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the project is related to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_project_contributors" (
  "research_project_contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project contributor */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the contributor is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the contributor */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_project_contributors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_project_contributors_research_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("research_project_id")
)
